headline: Should You Buy, Sell, or Hold TER Stock After a 312% Rise in One Year?

headline: Teradyne Introduces Integrated Test Solution for AI and Data Center Devices in Collaboration with Tokyo Electron
summary: NORTH READING, Mass., June 08, 2026--Teradyne announces an integrated test cell solution for known good device screening for data center devices, developed in collaboration with TEL.
